name: Logan State Bank
description_short: Logan State Bank is a community bank operating branches in Logan and Missouri Valley, Iowa, offering personal banking, home lending, online banking, and deposit products.
description_long:
Logan State Bank is a regional community bank serving the Logan and Missouri Valley areas of Iowa. The bank has operated for decades as a member of the FDIC, providing traditional banking services to local consumers and businesses. The institution maintains a physical presence with two full-service branches and emphasizes personal customer service alongside digital banking options.

The bank offers a range of consumer banking products including personal checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), home mortgage lending, mobile and online banking platforms, and various ancillary services. Their lending center provides information on personal loan and home financing options. They have invested in digital infrastructure, offering online enrollment, mobile banking applications, and financial calculators to serve customers remotely.

Logan State Bank distinguishes itself through its community-focused approach with limited branch locations in specific Iowa communities rather than a widespread network. The bank emphasizes direct customer service with phone and fax contact options, notary services, and safe deposit boxes. Their commitment to security is evident through explicit privacy disclosures and browser security information available on their website.

As a small regional bank, Logan State Bank serves customers seeking traditional community banking with established local relationships. However, the limited branch network and smaller institution status may mean fewer specialized products or competitive rates compared to larger national banks. Customers should verify current rates and product offerings directly with the bank, as the website provides limited specific rate information. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking platform with login and enrollment
Wire transfers and money transfer services
Reg E disclosure and electronic fund transfer services
pros: FDIC member bank providing deposit insurance protection up to $250,000
Two physical branch locations with extended drive-thru hours (Logan drive-thru until 5pm weekdays, Missouri Valley until 5pm weekdays)
Mobile banking app available for 24/7 account access
Online banking with multiple security features and browser requirements disclosed
Certificate of Deposit products offered with financial calculators to compare options
Home lending services with dedicated lending center and mortgage information
Additional services including notary public, safe deposit boxes, and gift cards
Equal Housing Lender commitment with CRA public disclosure available
cons: Very limited branch network (only 2 locations in Iowa) restricts physical access for most consumers
Website provides minimal information about specific rates, terms, or product details
Lobby hours are restrictive (Logan 9am-3pm, Missouri Valley 9am-4:30pm), closed Saturdays entirely
No indication of online account opening or remote customer onboarding capability
Limited product information online; most services require direct contact by phone
best_for: Residents of Logan or Missouri Valley, Iowa seeking local community banking relationships
Customers prioritizing personal service and face-to-face interactions with bank staff
Homebuyers in the service area looking for local mortgage lending options
Conservative savers interested in FDIC-insured deposit products like CDs
diagnosis: Logan State Bank is best for customers living in or near Logan or Missouri Valley, Iowa who value local community banking and personal relationships over convenience or product breadth. The primary caveat is the severely limited geographic reach—with only two branch locations, this bank is not accessible to most consumers outside its immediate service areas, and customers should verify that current rates and products meet their needs before opening accounts.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
